scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n bridge,vite -c blue,green "npm run bridge" "npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n bridge,mt5,vite -c blue,magenta,green "npm run bridge" "npm run mt5" "npm run dev"
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && concurrently -n bridge,mt5,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run bridge" "npm run mt5" "npm run preview"
scripts.app:dev: concurrently -n bridge,mt5,vite,electron -c blue,magenta,green,yellow "npm run bridge" "npm run mt5" "npm run dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 http://127.0.0.1:3847/api/status && electron . --dev"
scripts.pack:installer: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.pack:all: npm run build && electron-builder --win portable nsis --config electron-builder.yml
